content_preview:
Test Title: verify the login flow with mobile number 2022123420 and otp 3420

Description: I need to verify the login flow with above mobile number and otp. Launch the App and allow notifications on the popup to proceed further.

Preconditions:
- User must have the App and tap on Allow button on the initial popup

Expected Outcome: User should logged into the system

Priority: Medium

App Context:
- Package: in.stage.dev
- Version: 3.59.1 (505915)
